result: I'd make curiosity the default human operating system—rewiring us all to question everything, seek truth relentlessly, and collaborate on solving the universe's biggest puzzles, without ego or tribalism getting in the way. No more echo chambers, just endless "why?" leading to breakthroughs. World fixed. 🚀
